description: FastAPI server boots and GET /api/health returns ok:true
GET /api/markets returns stocks, crypto, forex, futures, bonds, cfd
GET /api/fields returns >=140 typed, grouped fields
GET /api/presets returns >=20 preset scans
POST /api/screen with a market-cap filter returns real rows with ticker+selected columns
POST /api/screen honors match=any (OR) vs match=all (AND)
Filters support full operator set (>,<,between,crosses,isin,above_pct,like)
Computed column via safe AST expr evaluates correctly e.g. (high-low)/close*100
Expression engine rejects unsafe input (no __, no eval, no attribute access)
Stat column zscore(field) computed across result set, mean approx 0
Stat column pctrank(field) yields 0..100
Composite factor_score: weighted z-score blend, direction-aware, ranks correctly
Factor presets (Momentum/Value/Quality/Growth/LowVol) available and apply weights
Backend has in-memory TTL cache; identical query within TTL served from cache
Backend gracefully handles upstream errors with JSON error, not 500 stacktrace
Static frontend served at / and loads synthwave shell without console errors
Synthwave theme applied: dark bg #0a0a0c, neon accents, JetBrains Mono in tables, glassmorphism panels
Data table renders real screener rows with monospace aligned numeric columns
Visual filter builder: add a field, pick operator, enter value, run, table updates
Filter builder supports AND/OR (match) toggle and multiple filter rows
Market switcher changes market and reruns screen with market-appropriate fields
Column picker: add/remove columns reflected in table header and body
Column picker can add a computed column via formula input
Column picker can add stat columns zscore/pctrank for a chosen field
Multi-key sort: click columns to build sort priority, badges show order 1/2/3
steps: click col A then shift-click col B

description: Single-click column header sorts asc/desc/none cycling
Client-side per-column quick filter narrows rows instantly without server round-trip
Numeric range slider/min-max client filter on a column works
steps: set min on a numeric col

description: Summary-stat footer shows count/mean/median/min/max/stdev/sum per numeric column and recomputes on filter
Conditional formatting: heatmap gradient per column (green high, pink low) toggleable
Change/PnL columns colored green positive, pink negative
steps: assert change col coloring matches sign

description: Preset scan library: clicking a preset loads its filters+columns and runs
At least 20 presets are clickable and each returns rows or an empty-state cleanly
Saved screens: save current screen config to localStorage and reload it
Watchlist: star a ticker, persists in localStorage, watchlist view filters to starred
CSV export downloads current (filtered, sorted, computed) table as .csv
Row detail drawer opens on row click showing expanded fields for that symbol
Sparkline mini-chart renders per row (or in drawer) from price-history field
Auto-refresh toggle re-runs the active screen on an interval
Command palette (Ctrl/Cmd-K) opens and can jump to presets/markets/actions
Keyboard nav: arrow keys move row selection, enter opens detail
Result count + query timing + market shown in a status/header bar
steps: assert header shows count and ms

description: Loading + empty + error states all render in-theme (neon spinner, empty card, error toast)
No em dashes anywhere in UI copy, comments, or docs
Layout is dense terminal-style, panels use glassmorphism + neon borders, interactives glow on hover
README documents setup (pip install, run) and embeds a fresh screenshot
SIGNALS preset group renders as its own section (golden cross, EMA ribbon, etc)
Stacked EMA Fibonacci ribbon preset (close>EMA8>EMA21>EMA34>EMA55>EMA89) returns real rows
Timeframe toggles add suffixed technical columns side-by-side (RSI, RSI|1W, RSI|1M)
steps: assert RSI|1W and RSI|1M columns with real values

description: Timeframe gate excludes fundamentals and toggling off removes only that variant
Drag-and-drop column reorder on headers and column-picker chips, click still sorts
steps: assert plain header click still sorts

description: Heatmap gradient visibly tints every cell across the range (mid-range alpha fix)
Momentum signal group: MACD/Stoch/StochRSI/RSI/AO/CCI crosses return rows with indicator columns
Trend signal group: VWAP reclaim, EMA8/21 cross, ADX trend, Parabolic SAR, Williams R, TV Strong Buy
Multi-timeframe alignment presets (Triple Screen, daily+weekly MACD) display suffixed columns side by side
steps: apply MACD Daily and Weekly Bull
assert MACD.macd|1W column with real value

description: Left rail and each panel scroll so all presets and sections are reachable (overflow fix)
Tabbed left rail: Presets/Filters/Columns/Factor/Saved as tabs, one tool at a time full height, no scroll-past, active tab persisted
Hideable rail: hide button, backslash key, and edge reveal strip toggle the rail for full-table mode, state persisted
